name: use-cursor
description: Manage Cursor CLI tasks via tmux with security hardening
author: Bruce + 凤雏

notes: Captures tmux pane output (may contain workspace data - use isolated mode)
All shell arguments escaped using single-quote method
ALL tmux send-keys use -l flag (verified: spawn.sh:40,46; spawn-isolated.sh:42,49; send.sh:24)
Newlines/control chars sanitized to prevent tmux injection
Isolated mode: env -i with hardcoded PATH (no env inheritance)
Does not download remote code at install time
child_process.exec required for tmux - static analysis flag is FALSE POSITIVE
